name: forge-os-golden-visions-v1
description: Golden product visions exercised end-to-end through the offline kernel.

visions.vision: A platform that helps small teams run governed AI agents safely, with approvals, evals, and a full audit trail.
A FinOps copilot that detects cloud cost anomalies and proposes safe, auto-approvable remediations.
A compliance evidence agent that continuously collects SOC2 controls and drafts audit-ready reports.
